---
title: "Introduction to Programming in R"
from: markdown+emoji
format:
  html:
    toc: false
page-layout: full
---

<style>

.section-cmd {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.72rem;
color: #aaa;
letter-spacing: 0.08em;
margin: 2.5rem 0 0;
padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e4e4;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 6px;
}
.section-cmd .ps { color: #16a34a; }

.m-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }

.m-item {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 72px 1fr;
gap: 0 1.25rem;
padding: 6px 0;
border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
align-items: baseline;
}
.m-item:first-child { border-top: 1px solid #f0f0f0; }

.m-num {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.68rem;
color: #888;
letter-spacing: 0.03em;
white-space: nowrap;
padding-top: 1px;
line-height: 1.5;
}

.m-body {
font-size: 0.84rem;
font-weight: 300;
color: #333;
line-height: 1.5;
display: flex;
align-items: baseline;
flex-wrap: wrap;
gap: 0 0.4rem;
}

.m-sep {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.67rem;
color: #ccc;
}

.m-sub {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.67rem;
color: #888;
}

.m-link {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.65rem;
letter-spacing: 0.04em;
padding: 1px 8px;
border-radius: 2px;
text-decoration: none !important;
transition: all 0.12s;
background: #111;
color: #fff !important;
white-space: nowrap;
}
.m-link:hover {
background: #16a34a !important;
color: #fff !important;
text-decoration: none !important;
}

.resources {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.72rem;
color: #888;
margin-top: 2rem;
padding-top: 1rem;
border-top: 1px solid #e4e4e4;
line-height: 1.9;
}
.resources a {
color: #111;
text-underline-offset: 2px;
}
.resources a:hover { color: #16a34a; }

</style>

A gentle and practical introduction to data analysis in R for people with no programming background. Each module includes pre-recorded lectures, guided practice exercises, and labs. We cover reading data into R, manipulating data with `dplyr`, and conducting statistical simulations.

---

<div class="section-cmd"><span class="ps">$</span> ls modules/</div>

<div class="m-list">

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">module-00</div>
<div class="m-body">
Getting Started
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">course structure, setting up your R environment</span>
&nbsp;<a href="0 Module/mod0.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">module-01</div>
<div class="m-body">
Introduction and Motivation for R Programming
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">why R, statistical computing, data analysis</span>
&nbsp;<a href="1 Module/mod1.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">module-02</div>
<div class="m-body">
Installing Packages and Reading Data
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">extending R, importing from various sources</span>
&nbsp;<a href="2 Module/mod2.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">module-03</div>
<div class="m-body">
Vectors and Lists
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">fundamental data structures in R</span>
&nbsp;<a href="3 Module/mod3.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">module-04</div>
<div class="m-body">
Data Manipulation
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">cleaning, transforming, reshaping with dplyr</span>
&nbsp;<a href="4 Module/mod4.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">module-05</div>
<div class="m-body">
Data Manipulation and Analysis II
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">advanced techniques for complex analysis tasks</span>
&nbsp;<a href="5 Module/mod5.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">module-06</div>
<div class="m-body">
Data Visualization as a Tool for Analysis
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">ggplot2, exploratory and communicative graphics</span>
&nbsp;<a href="6 Module/mod6.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">module-07</div>
<div class="m-body">
Grouped Analysis
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">group-wise operations and aggregations</span>
&nbsp;<a href="7 Module/mod7.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">module-08</div>
<div class="m-body">
Iteration
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">loops, functional programming, automation</span>
&nbsp;<a href="8 Module/mod8.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">module-09</div>
<div class="m-body">
Writing Functions
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">reusable code, maintainable analysis</span>
&nbsp;<a href="9 Module/mod9.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

</div>

<div class="resources">
<span style="color:#16a34a">$</span> cat resources.txt<br>
→ <a href="https://rstudio.com/resources/cheatsheets/" target="_blank">tidyverse cheatsheets</a> — start with dplyr and ggplot2<br>
→ <a href="https://r4ds.had.co.nz" target="_blank">R for Data Science</a> — free online book covering most tidyverse functions
</div>
